请输入应用名称查询: Please enter the application name to query
点击/拖拽单个或批量文件上传: Click/drag to upload individual or batch files
支持上传格式为xls、xlsx、csv文件: Supports uploading files in xls, xlsx, and csv formats
导入处理中，执行结果请前往导入记录查看: The import is being processed, please go to the import record to view the execution results.
文件上传成功，请至文件模块/导入任务，查看文件导入进度及结果信息: The file is uploaded successfully. Please go to the file module/import task to view the file import progress and result information.
存在上传失败文件，请至文件模块/导入任务，查看文件失败信息: There is a file that failed to upload. Please go to the file module/import task to view the file failure information.
导出成功：文件导出成功，请至 文件模块/导出任务 查看已导出文件: Export successful: The file was exported successfully. Please go to the file module/export task to view the exported file.
输入包含项包含模糊匹配: Input contains items that contain fuzzy matching
请选择是否已翻译: Please select whether it has been translated or not
翻译所在模块名称: Module name where the translation is located
页面弹窗 翻译资源项列表: Page pop-up translation resource item list
请输入翻译包含项模糊匹配: Please enter a translation that includes fuzzy matching terms
请选择翻译所在应用: Please select the application where the translation is located
导出全部应用可能会因为数据过多耗时较长，推荐按照源术语所属应用进行导出;: Exporting all applications may take a long time due to excessive data. It is recommended to export according to the application to which the source term belongs;
请选择是否激活: Please choose whether to activate or not
源术语所在应用: Application where the source term is located
请选择源术语所属应用: Please select the application to which the source term belongs
构建的智能体描述有助于用户更好的使用: Well-written agent description improves user experience
数据采集任务名称将用于定义数据集名称前缀: Data collection task name as dataset prefix
请输入引导用户录入全局变量的标题语: Please enter a title to guide users to input global variables
目标语言编码不能为空: Target language code cannot be empty
已存在应用为 {}、源术语为 {} 的全局翻译项: Global translation for app {} and source {} already exists
无效翻译应用范围，翻译应用范围只能是 “全局” 或者 “源术语所属应用”: Invalid translation scope. Only 'Global' or 'Source Term Application' allowed
无效翻译，找不到翻译项对应的应用: Invalid translation: associated application not found
无效的目标语言编码，当前仅支持目标语言编码为{}的翻译: Invalid target language code, only target language code {} is supported
无效翻译，应用字段不能为空: Invalid translation, application field cannot be empty
有导出任务正在执行，请过 5 分钟后再试: Export task running, please try again after 5 minutes
已存在应用为 {} , 源术语为 {} 的全局翻译项: Global translation for app {} and term {} already exists
源术语为: {} 已存在， 已在当前Excel中设置应用范围为全局翻译项: Source term: {} already exists, application scope set to global translation item in current Excel
当前有一位同学正在翻译，请刷新后查看: Someone is translating now, please refresh to view
翻译应用范围不能不能为空: Translation application scope cannot be empty
翻译数据已存在，请勿重复添加: Translation data already exists, do not add repeatedly
目标语言 与 源语言不能相同: Target language cannot be the same as source language
有导如任务正在执行，请过 5 分钟后再试: Import task running, please try again after 5 minutes
导出翻译中是否翻译为必选: Whether to translate as required during export translation
无效的目标语言编码，当前仅支持目标语言编码为 {} 的翻译: Invalid target language code, only {} supported
有导如任务正在执行，请过5分钟后再试: An import task is running, please try again after 5 minutes
源术语编码不能为空: Source term code cannot be empty
无法识别的语言编码，请正确设置语言的国际编码: Unrecognizable language code. Set valid international language code
导出翻译中应用范围为必选: Application scope is required in export translation
检查翻译项列表的大小是否为1: Check if the size of translation item list is 1
无效的激活项，激活选项只能是‘激活’或者‘未激活’: Invalid activation status. Only 'Active' or 'Inactive' allowed
源术语为: {} 已存在，已在当前 Excel 中设置为全局翻译项: Source term {} already exists, marked as global in Excel
未找到文件服务器配置，刷新失败: File server config not found, refresh failed
源术语为: {} 已存在， 已在当前 Excel 中设置应用范围为全局翻译项: Source term: {} already exists, set as global translation in current Excel
点击图片为智能体设置一个容易识别的 ICON: Click the image to set a recognizable ICON for the agent
检查翻译项列表是否为空: Check if translation item list is empty
无效的翻译值，翻译值不能为空: Invalid translation value, cannot be empty
无效的目标语言编码，当前仅支持 {}: Invalid target language code, only {} supported
源术语不允许重复,{}: Duplicate source term is not allowed, {}
检查翻译项列表的大小是否为 1: Check if translation item list size is 1
有导出任务正在执行，请过5分钟后再试: An export task is running, please try again after 5 minutes
无效的源术语，源术语不能为空: Invalid source term, cannot be empty
